user_query: I'm a software developer working on a cross-platform application. Can you fetch the available resolutions on different operating systems using the Lambdatest Screenshot tool? Additionally, can you provide me with the demand sensing data for the software development industry to understand the market trends?

TaskList.description: Fetch the available resolutions on different operating systems using the Lambdatest Screenshot tool.
Retrieve demand sensing data for the software development industry to understand market trends.
